text:
house to Saturn is occupied by the Sun
Sat.
Dt and Mercury. Consequently the native
Ven.
will be employed in a Government
concern. Later Saturn contacts Rahu in Pisces (4tt. from his own place). The
job may, therefore, be in an aviation concern. Saturn has been fortified by his
conjunction with Venus and aspect from Jupiter in whose house Saturn is
posited at birth. The job will, therefore, involve teaching others and public
ity. From bis 25th year he will occupy an ordinary place. He will be married
at about 26-27. He will have advancement in life from his 28th year onwards.
As Mars has Mercury in the 7th to him, married life will not be very happy.
Saturn cor 'acts Ketu and then meets Venus. But he will fight with Venus in
the 6th, there is a double marriage yoga. Even this will not bring happiness.
Propitiation of the Lord of Palaniwill give relief in these troubles. Between
34-35 the frrst wife may pass away and the native will wander in foreign
places.
